# Vextor

> Ahmedabad-based Salesforce consulting and BuilderTek specialization for project-based businesses.

## Primary site
- Homepage: https://www.vextor.co/
- Services: https://www.vextor.co/services
- Industries: https://www.vextor.co/industries
- Work: https://www.vextor.co/work
- Success Stories: https://www.vextor.co/success-stories
- About: https://www.vextor.co/about
- Contact: https://www.vextor.co/contact

## What Vextor does
- Salesforce consulting and architecture
- Workflow automation and process engineering
- Apex and Lightning Web Components development
- Salesforce integrations with finance and operational systems
- Managed Salesforce support
- BuilderTek implementation, cleanup, customization, and operational refinement

## Entity facts
- Brand: Vextor
- Legal name: Vextor Solution LLP
- Address: 7th floor, The Link, Vijay Cross Rd, Navrangpura, Ahmedabad, Gujarat 380009, India
- Email: hello@vextor.co
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/company/teamvextor
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/teamvextor
- Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/teamvextor
- X: https://x.com/TeamVextorr
